description1: My name is Lucas Virieux-Petit, I am 24. I have a professional bachelor's degree in computer science: "Full Stack Mobile Application Development". I am passionate about new technologies, IT,  web and mobile development.
description2: Searching for new experiences, I went to Australia when I was 19. This unique trip reinforced my idea of starting studies in web/mobile development. Back in France, I started my first year of a bachelor's degree in computer science in La Rochelle (France). I then took the incredible opportunity to do my second year in Ireland with the Erasmus exchange program, I decided to undertake my last year of bachelor's degree in web / mobile development in La Rochelle(France).
description3: You will find on my portfolio my works carried out as part of my studies and the beginning of my professional career.
